description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both legs straight and close together. The figure's arms are positioned alongside the body, and the overall silhouette is narrow and elongated. The head is proportionate to the body, and the posture suggests a neutral, relaxed stance. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, with no visible accessories or outerwear, and the feet are flat on the ground. The surface is uniformly colored and lacks detailed facial or garment features, giving the figure a minimalist, stylized appearance.
description: A slender adult pedestrian figure standing upright with arms at the sides and legs together, featuring a minimalist and stylized form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow silhouette, straight legs, and arms close to the body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile and the straight alignment of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, straight posture, and the backs of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the slim profile and the even stance of the figure.
